evals.prompt: Publish the file test_articles/test.md to my WeChat Official Account as a draft.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the Markdown, selects a style (or proposes one), runs the publisher script, and returns a success message with the media_id.
expectations: The agent proposes or confirms a visual style before publishing
The agent runs the publish.sh or wechat_publisher.py script
The final response includes a media_id from the WeChat API
The final response includes the article title
The agent does not ask for credentials if .env already exists

evals.prompt: I have a technical tutorial in evals/files/test_features.md. I want to publish it to WeChat with a 'Terminal' hacker style.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses --style terminal and publishes the article, returning a success response with media_id.
expectations: The agent uses --style terminal (not another style) in the command
The agent does not ask the user to confirm the style since it was already specified
The final response includes a media_id
The publisher script runs successfully without validation errors

evals.prompt: Publish evals/files/test.md to WeChat. I don't have a cover image, please handle it for me.
evals.expected_output: The agent publishes without a --thumb argument, allowing the script to auto-generate a cover from the title. The response confirms cover was auto-generated.
expectations: The agent does NOT prompt the user to provide a cover image
The agent runs the publisher without --thumb, relying on auto-generation
The response mentions that a cover was auto-generated
The final response includes a media_id

evals.prompt: 我想把 evals/files/test_features.md 这篇技术文章发布到微信公众号，帮我选一个合适的风格。
evals.expected_output: The agent recognizes the Chinese publish-to-WeChat intent, reads the article to assess its tone, proposes an appropriate style with a brief reason, and publishes after confirmation.
expectations: The agent correctly handles the Chinese-language request
The agent reads the article content before proposing a style
The agent proposes a specific style with a brief justification
The agent publishes after receiving (or implying) confirmation
The final response includes a media_id
